text: The Hebrew and the Greek versions are still in the first person, but the substance of Tobias’ prayer is the same.
All the other versions here have Ecbatana as the name of the Median city, ‘Rages’ is probably a copyist’s error, cf. 1.16 and 9.3.
The prayer of Sara is given in a quite different form by the other versions, including our present Aramaic text. From this point onwards, all the versions tell the story in the third person.
